Bash(python3 -c "
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
import json

path = '/Users/jacobskaue/Desktop/Brainspace/Desktop - DK-JacobSkaue2/Brain/jakala_strategy_2026_clean.pptx'
prs = Presentation\(path\)

print\(f'Slide dimensions: {prs.slide_width.emu} x {prs.slide_height.emu}'\)
print\(f'Number of slides: {len\(prs.slides\)}'\)
print\(f'Number of slide layouts: {len\(prs.slide_layouts\)}'\)
print\(\)

for i, slide in enumerate\(prs.slides\):
    print\(f'--- Slide {i+1} ---'\)
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    print\(f'  Background fill type: {fill.type}'\)
    try:
        print\(f'  Background color: {fill.fore_color.rgb}'\)
    except:
        pass
    for shape in slide.shapes:
        print\(f'  Shape: {shape.shape_type} | name: {shape.name} | has_text: {shape.has_text_frame}'\)
        if shape.has_text_frame:
            for para in shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
                for run in para.runs:
                    print\(f'    Text: \\"{run.text[:60]}\\" | font: {run.font.name} | size: {run.font.size} | bold: {run.font.bold}'\)
                    try:
                        print\(f'    Color: {run.font.color.rgb}'\)
                    except:
                        pass
")

Bash(python3 -c "
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor

path = '/Users/jacobskaue/Desktop/Brainspace/Desktop - DK-JacobSkaue2/Brain/jakala_strategy_2026_clean.pptx'
prs = Presentation\(path\)

print\(f'Slides: {len\(prs.slides\)} | Layouts: {len\(prs.slide_layouts\)}'\)
print\(f'Dimensions: {int\(prs.slide_width.emu/914400*2.54\)}cm x {int\(prs.slide_height.emu/914400*2.54\)}cm'\)
print\(\)

for i, slide in enumerate\(prs.slides[:4]\):
    print\(f'=== Slide {i+1} ==='\)
    bg = slide.background.fill
    print\(f'  BG fill type: {bg.type}'\)
    try: print\(f'  BG color: #{bg.fore_color.rgb}'\)
    except: pass
    for shape in slide.shapes:
        if shape.has_text_frame:
            for para in shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
                for run in para.runs:
                    if run.text.strip\(\):
                        fname = run.font.name
                        fsize = round\(run.font.size.pt\) if run.font.size else None
                        bold = run.font.bold
                        try: color = str\(run.font.color.rgb\)
                        except: color = 'inherited'
                        print\(f'  \\"{run.text[:50]}\\" | {fname} | {fsize}pt | bold={bold} | #{color}'\)
")

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt, Emu
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
import copy, shutil

# Colors from Jakala template
BLUE_BRIGHT = RGBColor\(0x15, 0x3E, 0xED\)   # #153EED
BLUE_DARK   = RGBColor\(0x02, 0x02, 0x66\)   # #020266
RED         = RGBColor\(0xF6, 0x57, 0x4A\)   # #F6574A
WHITE       = RGBColor\(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF\)
BG_COLOR    = RGBColor\(0x08, 0x08, 0x18\)   # near-black

FONT = 'Raleway'

# Slide dimensions \(25cm x 19cm = widescreen\)
W = Inches\(9.84\)
H = Inches\(7.48\)

def new_prs\(\):
    prs = Presentation\(\)
    prs.slide_width  = W
    prs.slide_height = H
    return prs

def set_bg\(slide, color=BG_COLOR\):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid\(\)
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color

def add_textbox\(slide, text, x, y, w, h,
                font_size=18, bold=False, color=WHITE,
                align=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font=FONT\):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox\(x, y, w, h\)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = align
    run = p.add_run\(\)
    run.text = text
    run.font.name = font
    run.font.size = Pt\(font_size\)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    return txBox

def add_rect\(slide, x, y, w, h, color=BLUE_BRIGHT\):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape\(1, x, y, w, h\)  # 1 = rectangle
    shape.fill.solid\(\)
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
    shape.line.fill.background\(\)
    return shape

def add_line\(slide, x, y, w, color=BLUE_BRIGHT\):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape\(1, x, y, w, Pt\(2\)\)
    shape.fill.solid\(\)
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
    shape.line.fill.background\(\)
    return shape

def add_para\(tf, text, font_size=13, bold=False, color=WHITE, space_before=6\):
    from pptx.util import Pt as PT
    p = tf.add_paragraph\(\)
    p.space_before = PT\(space_before\)
    run = p.add_run\(\)
    run.text = text
    run.font.name = FONT
    run.font.size = PT\(font_size\)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    return p

prs = new_prs\(\)
blank_layout = prs.slide_layouts[6]  # Blank

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# SLIDE 1 — COVER
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
s = prs.slides.add_slide\(blank_layout\)
set_bg\(s\)

# Blue accent bar bottom
add_rect\(s, Inches\(0\), Inches\(6.5\), W, Inches\(0.5\), BLUE_BRIGHT\)

# Tag line small
add_textbox\(s, 'JAKALA × MAXBO', Inches\(0.5\), Inches\(1.2\), Inches\(8\), Inches\(0.5\),
            font_size=11, bold=False, color=RGBColor\(0x99,0x99,0xCC\)\)

# Title
add_textbox\(s, 'Produkt Data\\nRoadmap 2026', Inches\(0.5\), Inches\(1.8\), Inches\(8.5\), Inches\(2.5\),
            font_size=52, bold=True, color=WHITE\)

# Blue accent word
add_textbox\(s, '→ Maxbo', Inches\(0.5\), Inches\(4.2\), Inches\(5\), Inches\(0.7\),
            font_size=28, bold=True, color=BLUE_BRIGHT\)

# Date
add_textbox\(s, 'Mars 2026', Inches\(0.5\), Inches\(5.8\), Inches\(4\), Inches\(0.4\),
            font_size=12, color=RGBColor\(0x88,0x88,0xAA\)\)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# SLIDE 2 — SITUASJON
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
s = prs.slides.add_slide\(blank_layout\)
set_bg\(s\)
add_line\(s, Inches\(0.5\), Inches\(0.55\), Inches\(8.8\)\)
add_textbox\(s, 'SITUASJON', Inches\(0.5\), Inches\(0.25\), Inches\(8\), Inches\(0.4\),
            font_size=10, color=BLUE_BRIGHT, bold=True\)
add_textbox\(s, 'Utgangspunkt — Maxbo i dag', Inches\(0.5\), Inches\(0.75\), Inches\(8.5\), Inches\(0.7\),
            font_size=26, bold=True, color=WHITE\)

# Left column
tb = slide_shapes_add_textbox = s.shapes.add_textbox\(Inches\(0.5\), Inches\(1.7\), Inches\(4.3\), Inches\(4.8\)\)
tf = tb.text_frame
tf.word_wrap = True
add_para\(tf, 'Tech-stack', 14, True, BLUE_BRIGHT, 0\)
add_para\(tf, '• 1 million produkter / 500M attribut-verdier', 12, False, WHITE, 4\)
add_para\(tf, '• Perfion \(master PIM\) → Azure → Pimcore → Magento', 12, False, WHITE, 4\)
add_para\(tf, '• RELEX \(supply chain\) · Pricer ESL \(in-store\)', 12, False, WHITE, 4\)
add_para\(tf, '• Ingen AI- eller personaliserings-lag i dag', 12, False, WHITE, 4\)
add_para\(tf, '', 10, False, WHITE, 6\)
add_para\(tf, 'Aktiv leveranse', 14, True, BLUE_BRIGHT, 8\)
add_para\(tf, '• Speedtrain onboarding med Lars — 09.03', 12, False, WHITE, 4\)
add_para\(tf, '• Enterspeed involvert som teknisk partner', 12, False, WHITE, 4\)
add_para\(tf, '', 10, False, WHITE, 6\)
add_para\(tf, 'Åpne spørsmål', 14, True, RED, 8\)
add_para\(tf, '• Produktkategorisering: innenfor scope?', 12, False, WHITE, 4\)
add_para\(tf, '• Perfion write-back: krav ikke kartlagt', 12, False, WHITE, 4\)
add_para\(tf, '• Ingen kommersiell sponsor over Lars', 12, False, WHITE, 4\)

# Right column — stats
for i, \(val, lbl\) in enumerate\([\('1M+','produkter i katalogen'\),\('4','systemlag i datapipeline'\),\('€900K','ekspansjonspotensial 18 mnd'\)]\):
    ypos = Inches\(1.7\) + i * Inches\(1.6\)
    add_rect\(s, Inches\(5.2\), ypos, Inches\(4.1\), Inches\(1.3\), BLUE_DARK\)
    add_textbox\(s, val, Inches\(5.35\), ypos + Pt\(8\), Inches\(3.8\), Inches\(0.7\),
                font_size=32, bold=True, color=BLUE_BRIGHT\)
    add_textbox\(s, lbl, Inches\(5.35\), ypos + Inches\(0.62\), Inches\(3.8\), Inches\(0.5\),
                font_size=12, color=WHITE\)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# Helper: phase slide
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
def phase_slide\(prs, tag, title, period, value, accent, bullets_left, bullets_right, success\):
    s = prs.slides.add_slide\(blank_layout\)
    set_bg\(s\)
    add_line\(s, Inches\(0.5\), Inches\(0.55\), Inches\(8.8\), accent\)
    add_textbox\(s, tag, Inches\(0.5\), Inches\(0.25\), Inches\(8\), Inches\(0.4\),
                font_size=10, color=accent, bold=True\)
    add_textbox\(s, title, Inches\(0.5\), Inches\(0.72\), Inches\(6.5\), Inches\(0.65\),
                font_size=24, bold=True, color=WHITE\)
    # Period pill
    add_rect\(s, Inches\(7.2\), Inches\(0.75\), Inches\(2.1\), Inches\(0.45\), BLUE_DARK\)
    add_textbox\(s, period, Inches\(7.25\), Inches\(0.77\), Inches\(2\), Inches\(0.38\),
                font_size=11, color=BLUE_BRIGHT, align=PP_ALIGN.CENTER\)
    # Value
    add_textbox\(s, value, Inches\(0.5\), Inches\(1.45\), Inches\(4\), Inches\(0.55\),
                font_size=20, bold=True, color=accent\)

    # Left bullets
    tb = s.shapes.add_textbox\(Inches\(0.5\), Inches\(2.1\), Inches\(4.3\), Inches\(4\)\)
    tf = tb.text_frame; tf.word_wrap = True
    first = True
    for header, items in bullets_left:
        add_para\(tf, header, 13, True, accent, 0 if first else 10\)
        first = False
        for item in items:
            add_para\(tf, f'• {item}', 12, False, WHITE, 3\)

    # Right bullets
    tb2 = s.shapes.add_textbox\(Inches\(5.0\), Inches\(2.1\), Inches\(4.3\), Inches\(4\)\)
    tf2 = tb2.text_frame; tf2.word_wrap = True
    first2 = True
    for header, items in bullets_right:
        add_para\(tf2, header, 13, True, accent, 0 if first2 else 10\)
        first2 = False
        for item in items:
            add_para\(tf2, f'• {item}', 12, False, WHITE, 3\)

    # Success criterion bar
    add_rect\(s, Inches\(0.5\), Inches\(6.3\), Inches\(8.84\), Inches\(0.75\), RGBColor\(0x10,0x10,0x30\)\)
    add_textbox\(s, f'Suksesskriterium: {success}', Inches\(0.65\), Inches\(6.38\), Inches\(8.5\), Inches\(0.55\),
                font_size=12, color=WHITE\)
    return s

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# SLIDE 3 — FASE 0
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
phase_slide\(prs,
    'FASE 0 — NÅ → APRIL 2026',
    'Stabilisering av leveransen',
    'Nå → April 2026',
    'Inkludert i eksisterende avtale',
    BLUE_BRIGHT,
    [
        \('Speedtrain onboarding', [
            'Walkthrough med Lars — 09.03',
            'Arbeidsflyt: produkt → enrichment → output',
            'Beste praksis for norske produktdata',
            'Mål: Lars jobber selvstendig etter møtet',
        ]\),
        \('Perfion Write-back', [
            'Kartlegge Maxbos tekniske krav',
            'Felter, format og frekvens',
            'Design teknisk løsning med Enterspeed',
        ]\),
    ],
    [
        \('Produktkategorisering — Scope', [
            'Krever funksjonalitet ikke i Speedtrain ennå',
            'Alternativ A: Vente til funksjon lanseres',
            'Alternativ B: Ny SOW / endringsordre',
            'Alternativ C: Manuell midlertidig løsning',
            '→ Beslutning kreves umiddelbart',
        ]\),
    ],
    'Lars jobber selvstendig i Speedtrain. Scope avklart. Perfion write-back i gang.'
\)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# SLIDE 4 — FASE 1
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
phase_slide\(prs,
    'FASE 1 — APRIL → JUNI 2026',
    'Data Revenue Diagnostic',
    'April → Juni 2026',
    'Estimert verdi: €80–150K',
    BLUE_BRIGHT,
    [
        \('Hva vi gjør', [
            'Produktdata-revisjon per kategori',
            'Pipeline-analyse: Perfion → Azure → Pimcore → Magento',
            'Søk og discovery-test mot live data',
            'Revenue impact-estimat i NOK',
            'Rapport og presentasjon til ledelse',
        ]\),
        \('Hvorfor nå', [
            '1M produkter — selv liten datavikt gir stor lekkasje',
            'Konverterer leveranse til rådgivningsforhold',
            'Åpner for kommersiell sponsor over Lars',
        ]\),
    ],
    [
        \('Nøkkelbudskap til Maxbo', [
            '"Dere har 1 million produkter i et 4-lags system."',
            '"Datasvikt er stille og kostbart."',
            '"Vi kan kvantifisere det i NOK — på 6 uker."',
        ]\),
        \('Buyer vi trenger', [
            'CTO / Head of Technology',
            'Head of Ecommerce / Digital Director',
            'Lars som intern champion',
        ]\),
    ],
    'Maxbo godkjenner rapport og ber om Fase 2.'
\)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# SLIDE 5 — FASE 2
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
phase_slide\(prs,
    'FASE 2 — JUNI → OKTOBER 2026',
    'Commerce Optimization',
    'Juni → Oktober 2026',
    'Estimert verdi: €200–350K',
    BLUE_BRIGHT,
    [
        \('Leveranser', [
            'Produktdata-enrichment i skala via Speedtrain',
            'Søkeoptimalisering basert på korrekte attributter',
            'Produktkategorisering \(Speedtrain-funksjon\)',
            'PIM-kvalitetsstyring løpende prosess i Perfion',
            'Konverteringsmåling — dokumentert omsetningseffekt',
        ]\),
    ],
    [
        \('Ekspansjons-trigger', [
            'Vellykket Fase 1 → ingen ny salgsprosess',
            'Rapport gir mandat og budsjett',
            'CTO og Head of Ecom er allerede involvert',
        ]\),
        \('Forventet effekt', [
            'Forbedret søkerelevans i Magento',
            'Høyere konverteringsrate på nøkkelkategorier',
            'Redusert manuelt datahåndteringsarbeid',
            'Målbar omsetningsøkning dokumentert',
        ]\),
    ],
    'Målbar forbedring i søk og konvertering. CTO involvert som sponsor.'
\)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# SLIDE 6 — FASE 3
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
phase_slide\(prs,
    'FASE 3 — OKTOBER 2026 → Q1 2027',
    'AI Readiness',
    'Okt 2026 → Q1 2027',
    'Estimert verdi: €250–400K',
    BLUE_BRIGHT,
    [
        \('Hva vi gjør', [
            'AI Readiness Diagnostic — personalisering og AI-søk',
            'Definere use cases: anbefalinger, kampanjer, søk',
            'Arkitekturvurdering — Magento og headless-strategi',
            'Design og lever første AI-drevne use case',
        ]\),
        \('Hvorfor Maxbo er klar etter Fase 2', [
            'Ren, konsistent produktdata er fundamentet for AI',
            'PIM-pipeline er optimalisert og stabil',
            'Intern tillit til JAKALA er bygget over 12 måneder',
        ]\),
    ],
    [
        \('AI-muligheter for Maxbo', [
            'Produktanbefalinger basert på kjøpshistorikk',
            'AI-drevet søkerelevans \(semantisk søk\)',
            'Etterspørselsprognoser \(integrert med RELEX\)',
            'Personaliserte kampanjer via CRM-data',
        ]\),
    ],
    'Maxbo vedtar AI-roadmap med JAKALA som leverandør av første use case.'
\)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# SLIDE 7 — FASE 4
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
phase_slide\(prs,
    'FASE 4 — 2027+',
    'Platform Modernization / DXP',
    '2027+',
    'Estimert verdi: €400–600K+',
    RGBColor\(0xF6, 0x57, 0x4A\),
    [
        \('Magento-suksesjon', [
            'Magento nærmer seg teknisk end-of-life for Maxbos skala',
            'Vurdere Adobe Commerce, Commercetools, headless',
            'Arkitektur-blueprint for fremtidig tech-stack',
            'Migreringsstrategi og faseinndelt implementering',
        ]\),
    ],
    [
        \('Avhengigheter', [
            'Fase 3 fullført',
            'CEO / COO Løvenskiold Handel aktivert som sponsor',
            'Budsjettgodkjenning på C-suite-nivå',
        ]\),
        \('JAKALA-rolle', [
            'Lead architect på DXP-program',
            'Headless commerce implementering',
            'AI-drevet experience layer',
            'Multi-år transformasjonspartner',
        ]\),
    ],
    'Maxbo vedtar DXP-transformasjon med JAKALA som strategisk partner.'
\)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# SLIDE 8 — TIDSLINJE & VERDI
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
s = prs.slides.add_slide\(blank_layout\)
set_bg\(s\)
add_line\(s, Inches\(0.5\), Inches\(0.55\), Inches\(8.8\)\)
add_textbox\(s, 'OVERBLIK', Inches\(0.5\), Inches\(0.25\), Inches\(8\), Inches\(0.4\),
            font_size=10, color=BLUE_BRIGHT, bold=True\)
add_textbox\(s, 'Tidslinje & Samlet Verdi', Inches\(0.5\), Inches\(0.72\), Inches\(8.5\), Inches\(0.65\),
            font_size=26, bold=True, color=WHITE\)

phases = [
    \('Fase 0', 'Stabilisering', 'Nå → Apr 2026', 'I avtale', BLUE_DARK\),
    \('Fase 1', 'Data Diagnostic', 'Apr → Jun 2026', '€80–150K', BLUE_BRIGHT\),
    \('Fase 2', 'Commerce Opt.', 'Jun → Okt 2026', '€200–350K', BLUE_BRIGHT\),
    \('Fase 3', 'AI Readiness', 'Okt 2026 → Q1 27', '€250–400K', BLUE_BRIGHT\),
    \('Fase 4', 'Platform/DXP', '2027+', '€400–600K+', RED\),
]

for i, \(tag, name, period, val, color\) in enumerate\(phases\):
    x = Inches\(0.3 + i * 1.88\)
    add_rect\(s, x, Inches\(1.7\), Inches\(1.75\), Inches\(3.2\), color\)
    add_textbox\(s, tag, x + Inches\(0.1\), Inches\(1.78\), Inches\(1.55\), Inches\(0.4\),
                font_size=10, bold=True, color=WHITE\)
    add_textbox\(s, name, x + Inches\(0.1\), Inches\(2.2\), Inches\(1.55\), Inches\(0.6\),
                font_size=13, bold=True, color=WHITE\)
    add_textbox\(s, period, x + Inches\(0.1\), Inches\(2.85\), Inches\(1.55\), Inches\(0.55\),
                font_size=10, color=RGBColor\(0xCC,0xCC,0xFF\)\)
    add_textbox\(s, val, x + Inches\(0.1\), Inches\(3.5\), Inches\(1.55\), Inches\(0.5\),
                font_size=14, bold=True, color=WHITE\)

# Arrow connectors \(simple text arrows\)
for i in range\(4\):
    x = Inches\(0.3 + i * 1.88\) + Inches\(1.75\)
    add_textbox\(s, '→', x, Inches\(3.0\), Inches\(0.13\), Inches\(0.4\),
                font_size=18, bold=True, color=BLUE_BRIGHT, align=PP_ALIGN.CENTER\)

# Total value box
add_rect\(s, Inches\(0.5\), Inches\(5.3\), Inches\(8.84\), Inches\(1.55\), RGBColor\(0x05,0x05,0x25\)\)
add_textbox\(s, 'Samlet ekspansjonspotensial — 18 måneder', Inches\(0.7\), Inches\(5.38\), Inches\(5\), Inches\(0.45\),
            font_size=13, color=RGBColor\(0xAA,0xAA,0xCC\)\)
add_textbox\(s, '€530K – €900K', Inches\(0.7\), Inches\(5.85\), Inches\(6\), Inches\(0.75\),
            font_size=34, bold=True, color=BLUE_BRIGHT\)
add_textbox\(s, '\(ekskl. Fase 4\)', Inches\(5.0\), Inches\(6.22\), Inches\(3.5\), Inches\(0.4\),
            font_size=11, color=RGBColor\(0x88,0x88,0xAA\), align=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT\)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# SLIDE 9 — NÆSTE SKRIDT
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
s = prs.slides.add_slide\(blank_layout\)
set_bg\(s\)
add_line\(s, Inches\(0.5\), Inches\(0.55\), Inches\(8.8\)\)
add_textbox\(s, 'NÆSTE SKRIDT', Inches\(0.5\), Inches\(0.25\), Inches\(8\), Inches\(0.4\),
            font_size=10, color=BLUE_BRIGHT, bold=True\)
add_textbox\(s, 'Prioriterte handlinger', Inches\(0.5\), Inches\(0.72\), Inches\(8.5\), Inches\(0.65\),
            font_size=26, bold=True, color=WHITE\)

actions = [
    \('1', '09.03 — Speedtrain onboarding', 'Lars + Jacob gjennomgår produkter og prompts. Mål: Lars jobber selvstendig.', BLUE_BRIGHT\),
    \('2', 'Snarest — Scope-avklaring', 'Jacob + Enterspeed: er produktkategorisering innenfor scope? Ny SOW ved behov.', RED\),
    \('3', 'Mars 2026 — Perfion write-back', 'Kartlegg tekniske krav. Design løsning med Enterspeed.', BLUE_BRIGHT\),
    \('4', 'April 2026 — Presenter Fase 1', 'Lever Data Revenue Diagnostic-forslag til CTO / Head of Ecommerce.', BLUE_BRIGHT\),
]

for i, \(num, title, desc, color\) in enumerate\(actions\):
    y = Inches\(1.6\) + i * Inches\(1.25\)
    add_rect\(s, Inches\(0.5\), y, Inches\(0.55\), Inches\(0.55\), color\)
    add_textbox\(s, num, Inches\(0.5\), y, Inches\(0.55\), Inches\(0.55\),
                font_size=22, bold=True, color=WHITE, align=PP_ALIGN.CENTER\)
    add_textbox\(s, title, Inches\(1.2\), y, Inches\(8\), Inches\(0.45\),
                font_size=15, bold=True, color=WHITE\)
    add_textbox\(s, desc, Inches\(1.2\), y + Inches\(0.42\), Inches\(8\), Inches\(0.6\),
                font_size=12, color=RGBColor\(0xBB,0xBB,0xDD\)\)

# Bottom closing line
add_rect\(s, Inches\(0\), Inches\(6.9\), W, Inches\(0.28\), BLUE_BRIGHT\)
add_textbox\(s, 'JAKALA × Maxbo · Roadmap 2026', Inches\(0.3\), Inches\(6.91\), Inches\(9\), Inches\(0.25\),
            font_size=10, color=WHITE\)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# SAVE
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
out = '/Users/jacobskaue/Desktop/jakala-commercial-os/Accounts/maxbo/maxbo-roadmap-2026.pptx'
prs.save\(out\)
print\(f'Gemt: {out}'\)
EOF)

Bash(cd "/Users/jacobskaue/Desktop/jakala-commercial-os/knowledge" && python3 -c "
import zipfile, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET, re

pptx = 'JKL - Shopify Practice - Technology.pptx'
texts = []

with zipfile.ZipFile\(pptx, 'r'\) as z:
    slides = sorted\([f for f in z.namelist\(\) if f.startswith\('ppt/slides/slide'\) and f.endswith\('.xml'\)]\)
    for slide in slides:
        with z.open\(slide\) as f:
            tree = ET.parse\(f\)
            root = tree.getroot\(\)
            ns = '{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/main}'
            slide_texts = []
            for t in root.iter\(ns + 't'\):
                if t.text and t.text.strip\(\):
                    slide_texts.append\(t.text.strip\(\)\)
            if slide_texts:
                texts.append\('--- ' + slide + ' ---'\)
                texts.append\(' | '.join\(slide_texts\)\)

print\('\\n'.join\(texts\)\)
")

Bash(cd "/Users/jacobskaue/Desktop/jakala-commercial-os/knowledge" && python3 -c "
import zipfile, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET

pptx = 'JKL - Shopify Practice - Technology.pptx'

with zipfile.ZipFile\(pptx, 'r'\) as z:
    slides = sorted\([f for f in z.namelist\(\) if f.startswith\('ppt/slides/slide'\) and f.endswith\('.xml'\)]\)
    for i, slide in enumerate\(slides[:30], 1\):
        with z.open\(slide\) as f:
            tree = ET.parse\(f\)
            root = tree.getroot\(\)
            ns = '{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/main}'
            slide_texts = []
            for t in root.iter\(ns + 't'\):
                if t.text and t.text.strip\(\):
                    slide_texts.append\(t.text.strip\(\)\)
            unique = []
            seen = set\(\)
            for t in slide_texts:
                if t not in seen:
                    seen.add\(t\)
                    unique.append\(t\)
            if unique:
                print\(f'SLIDE {i}: ' + ' / '.join\(unique[:25]\)\)
")

import sys
html = sys.stdin.read\(\)
# Check for any elements with position:fixed or z-index that could overlay
import re
fixed = re.findall\(r'position.*fixed', html\)

print\('Z-index values:', zindex[:10]\)
")

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:5050/ | python3 -c "
import sys, re
html = sys.stdin.read\(\)
# Check for pointer-events or user-select issues
pe = re.findall\(r'pointer-events[^;]+', html\)
print\('pointer-events:', pe\)
# Check JS for syntax errors by extracting script
script_match = re.search\(r'<script>\(.*?\)</script>', html, re.DOTALL\)
if script_match:
    script = script_match.group\(1\)
    print\(f'Script length: {len\(script\)} chars'\)
    # Look for obvious issues
    print\('boot\(\) present:', 'boot\(\)' in script\)
    print\('showTab present:', 'showTab' in script\)
")

import sys, re
html = sys.stdin.read\(\)
script = re.search\(r'<script>\(.*?\)</script>', html, re.DOTALL\)
if script:
    js = script.group\(1\)
    with open\('/tmp/test_app.js', 'w'\) as f:
        f.write\(js\)
    print\('JS extracted'\)
"
node --check /tmp/test_app.js 2>&1)
